creator: Alex.Bakhtin@gmail.com
text:
Distfile for reaper v0.03 is extremely rare now. Reaper was updated to v 1.00 three years ago. Patch to update devel/p5-reaper to the latest version included.

Please be aware that module name was changed from reaper to Reaper. Probaly it's better to rename this port to devel/p5-Reaper and update all dependent ports.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
